name: PIN Switch
description: Broadband PIN diode switches for RF and microwave applications. SPST through SP8T configurations available.

name: Attenuator
description: Fixed and variable attenuators covering DC to 40 GHz. Available in chip, SMT, and connectorized packages.

name: Phase Shifter
description: Analog and digital phase shifters for phased array systems, test equipment, and communications.

name: Limiter
description: High power limiters for receiver protection. Fast recovery and low leakage options available.

name: Detector
description: Schottky diode detectors for power monitoring and level control applications.

name: Isolator & Circulator
description: Broadband ferrite isolators and circulators. Coaxial, drop-in, and waveguide packages available.

name: Power Divider
description: Wilkinson power dividers/combiners. 2-way, 4-way, and 8-way configurations.

name: Coupler
description: Directional couplers and hybrid couplers for signal sampling and power monitoring.

name: Filter
description: Bandpass, lowpass, highpass, and bandstop filters. Cavity, ceramic, and LC topologies.

name: Hybrid Coupler
description: 90° and 180° hybrid couplers for balanced amplifiers, mixers, and phase array networks.
